factoryNotes.notes: Tile-style action button without module-local styling.

symbols.name: Control
symbols.notes: Base chainable wrapper around a DOM node.

symbols.name: Hyperlink
symbols.notes: Anchor wrapper with optional icon and external-target behavior.

symbols.name: Image
symbols.notes: Image wrapper around `img`.

symbols.name: Svg
symbols.notes: Supports fetch, clone, and ID retargeting for reusable SVGs.

symbols.name: Paragraph
symbols.notes: Semantic `p` wrapper.

symbols.name: Heading
symbols.notes: Semantic heading wrapper (`h1`–`h6` via level option).

symbols.name: Span
symbols.notes: Generic inline wrapper.

symbols.name: Container
symbols.notes: Generic block wrapper.

symbols.name: StackPanel
symbols.notes: Row/column layout primitive used throughout panel layouts (`new StackPanel({ isVertical: false|true })`).

symbols.name: ScrollViewer
symbols.notes: Scrollable container wrapper.

symbols.name: Grid
symbols.notes: Grid layout primitive with explicit column or auto-fit helpers.

symbols.name: Rectangle
symbols.notes: Generic panel container.

symbols.name: Label
symbols.notes: Label wrapper for form controls.

symbols.name: Form
symbols.notes: Form wrapper with submit helpers.

symbols.name: TextBlock
symbols.notes: Inline text primitive.

symbols.name: Caption
symbols.notes: Thin `small` wrapper.

symbols.name: Title
symbols.notes: Panel-style title text for section headers.

symbols.name: Disclaimer
symbols.notes: Muted helper or legal copy.

symbols.name: Code
symbols.notes: Inline code / API signature chip.

symbols.name: Kbd
symbols.notes: Keyboard shortcut chip.

symbols.name: Badge
symbols.notes: Compact status / label badge.

symbols.name: Canvas
symbols.notes: HTML canvas wrapper for custom drawing.

symbols.name: Card
symbols.notes: Elevated surface shell (`Rectangle` + `Card` class).

symbols.name: Spacer
symbols.notes: Vertical spacer between stacked items.

symbols.name: HSpacer
symbols.notes: Horizontal spacer between inline or row items.

symbols.name: Handle
symbols.notes: Drag / resize handle element (`new Handle("drag"|"resize")`).

symbols.name: TabItem
symbols.notes: Tab chrome created by `TabView.addTab()` — not usually constructed directly.

symbols.name: ToolbarButton
symbols.notes: Compact button for toolbars and field-control wrappers.

symbols.name: center
symbols.notes: Adds the shared `centered` class to a control.

symbols.name: InputText
symbols.notes: Single-line input with editor-style propagation guards.

symbols.name: InputSearch
symbols.notes: Search input variant of `InputText`.

symbols.name: Icon
symbols.notes: Material Symbols icon span.

symbols.name: InputTextArea
symbols.notes: Multiline editor primitive with tab insertion support.

symbols.name: InputDropdown
symbols.notes: Native select wrapper.

symbols.name: Checkbox
symbols.notes: Checkbox input primitive.

symbols.name: InputColor
symbols.notes: Color input primitive.

symbols.name: InputNumber
symbols.notes: Numeric input with drag and keyboard adjustments.

symbols.name: InputInteger
symbols.notes: Integer-specialized numeric input.

symbols.name: Slider
symbols.notes: Range track plus numeric field for continuous values.

symbols.name: LineBreak
symbols.notes: Thin `br` wrapper.

symbols.name: Line
symbols.notes: Divider wrapper around `hr`.

symbols.name: Button
symbols.notes: Button primitive with optional prepended icon.

symbols.name: IconButton
symbols.notes: Tile-style button for icon + label + meta content.

symbols.name: RibbonButton
symbols.notes: Borderless icon+label control with tab-style accent when selected. Use in RibbonBar.

symbols.name: ProgressBar
symbols.notes: Native progress wrapper.

symbols.name: TabView
symbols.notes: Self-managed tab container.

symbols.name: InputList
symbols.notes: Selectable list container.

symbols.name: InputListItem
symbols.notes: Clickable row for `InputList`.

symbols.name: InputDate
symbols.notes: Composite date and time picker.

symbols.name: ProgressRing
symbols.notes: Overlay spinner with text and percentage states.

symbols.name: Tooltip
symbols.notes: Hover tooltip with theme variants.

symbols.name: DrawUI
symbols.notes: Main facade for primitives and composed helpers. Emitted classes vary by factory method.

symbols.name: ContentPanel
symbols.notes: Panel scaffold. Use header()/content()/footer() to set regions; add() appends to content.

symbols.name: FloatingDialog
symbols.notes: Lightweight floating panel built on `ContentPanel`.

symbols.name: WorkspacePanel
symbols.notes: Collapsible ContentPanel mounted as a tab in a WorkspaceRegion (left/right/bottom).

symbols.name: Header
symbols.notes: Shared title/icon/actions row for panel chrome (`ContentPanel`, `CollapsiblePanel`, `WorkspacePanel`).

symbols.name: RibbonBar
symbols.notes: Horizontal ribbon / action row for panel footers or the app shell. Pair with RibbonButton.

symbols.name: Flyout
symbols.notes: Expandable tool panel with optional search row.

symbols.name: CollapsiblePanel
symbols.notes: ContentPanel with a header collapse toggle.

symbols.name: InstructionPanel
symbols.notes: Titled panel of keyboard / pointer instruction rows.

symbols.name: InstructionLine
symbols.notes: One keyboard shortcut row: key chip + description.

symbols.name: SplitContainer
symbols.notes: Flex host for horizontal/vertical split panes.

symbols.name: Toast
symbols.notes: Transient notification (`new Toast(message, type)`) or progress overlay (`toast.show` / `update` / `hide`).

symbols.name: Operator
symbols.notes: Icon-only operator control shell.

symbols.name: LabeledBoxItem
symbols.notes: Checkbox + icon + label menu row for workspace menus.

symbols.name: WorkspaceLayout
symbols.notes: Applies workspace grid, resizers, and stacked CollapsiblePanel / WorkspacePanel roots. Undock transfers content into a FloatingWindow.

symbols.name: buildWorldFromConfig
symbols.notes: Build the `#World` DOM tree from declarative config before `WorkspaceLayout.init()`.

symbols.name: createDefaultWorldConfig
symbols.notes: Default workspace shell config with stable region ids for `WorkspaceLayout`.

symbols.name: FloatingWindow
symbols.notes: Free-floating window with docking controls.

symbols.name: NavigationList
symbols.notes: One-level-at-a-time hierarchical navigation with back control.

symbols.name: TreeView
symbols.notes: Expandable nested tree; same data options shape as `NavigationList`.

symbols.name: Markdown
symbols.notes: Markdown (or sanitized HTML) renderer. Min build uses the built-in converter; full build uses Showdown + Highlight.js when those peers are present.

symbols.name: Chart
symbols.notes: Chart.js-backed visualization panel used by `DrawUI.Chart()`.

symbols.name: DataGrid
symbols.notes: AG Grid-backed spreadsheet panel used by `DrawUI.Spreadsheet()`.

symbols.name: GanttChart
symbols.notes: jsGantt-improved-backed scheduling chart.

symbols.name: SortableList
symbols.notes: Drag-and-drop reorder list with optional checkboxes.

symbols.name: RadialMenu
symbols.notes: Radial interaction overlay.

symbols.name: AppShell
symbols.notes: SPA host with sidebar navigation and hash routing.

symbols.name: NavigationView
symbols.notes: Sidebar + content navigation scaffold.

symbols.name: PropertyGrid
symbols.notes: Key/value property editor grid.

symbols.name: NodeGraph
symbols.notes: Interactive node graph editor.

symbols.name: StatusBar
symbols.notes: Application status bar with message regions.

symbols.name: ThemeToggle
symbols.notes: Light/dark theme toggle control.

symbols.name: PropertyGridRow
symbols.notes: Single row helper for `PropertyGrid`.

symbols.name: ICONS
symbols.notes: Material Symbols icon name constants.

symbols.name: makeDraggable
symbols.notes: Attaches drag behavior to a panel via a header handle element.

symbols.name: makeResizable
symbols.notes: Attaches edge resize behavior to a floating panel.

symbols.name: makeFlexResizer
symbols.notes: Creates a pointer-driven flex size resizer between siblings.

symbols.name: createSplitResizer
symbols.notes: Builds a resizer control for a split-pane child index.

symbols.name: createLayoutResizerHandle
symbols.notes: Creates a left/right/bottom workspace layout resizer handle.

symbols.name: buildWorkspaceDockHandlers
symbols.notes: Returns dock/undock handlers for WorkspacePanel chrome wired to a WorkspaceLayout.

cssEntryPoints.purpose: Imports token, reset, primitive, and generic component layers.
Material Symbols stylesheet for icon-emitting components.
